ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "unemployment" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "total_wages" REAL /* Total wages earned in the year */,
  "avg_wage" REAL /* Average wage calculated for the year */,
  "nat_hh_med_income" REAL /* National median household income */,
  "nat_unemployment" INTEGER /* National unemployment rate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_market" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "housing_med" REAL /* Median housing price in the year */,
  "rent_med" REAL /* Median rent price in the year */,
  "zhvi" REAL /* Zillow Home Value Index for the year */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Number of houses available for sale or rent */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of houses sold in the year */,
  "new_constructions" INTEGER /* Number of new housing constructions in the year */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing economic indicators */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_market_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_data" (
  "regional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing states */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing economic indicators */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing housing market */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Regional Gross Domestic Product */,
  "median_hh_income" REAL /* Median household income for the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_market ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User's browser and device information */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
